# Interface: BrowserPort

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:111](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L111)

Abstract browser interface for the website specification runner.
One implementation lives in `integrations/playwright/` — a single shared
browser instance per runner; each `open()` gets a fresh, isolated context.

```ts
close: () => Promise<void>;
```

Defined in: [core/ports/browser.port.ts:113](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/ports/browser.port.ts#L113)
